Legal

Privacy Policy

This Privacy Policy explains how Venue Oaón ("we", "us", "our") collects, uses, and protects your personal information in compliance with the Protection of Personal Information Act, 2013 (POPIA) of South Africa. By using this website or submitting an enquiry, you agree to this policy.

Effective date: 20 April 2026

1. Who we are

Venue Oaón is an intimate event space located in Montana, Pretoria, Gauteng, South Africa. We can be reached at hello@venueoaon.co.za.

2. What data we collect

We collect the following personal information when you submit an enquiry via our website:

  • Name — to address you personally
  • Email address — to respond to your enquiry
  • Phone number — if provided, to contact you
  • Event details — type of event, preferred date, guest count, and package interest

We do not collect payment information, government ID numbers, or any sensitive personal information.

3. How we use your data

We use the information you provide exclusively to:

  • Respond to your venue enquiry
  • Send you a pricing guide or quote relevant to your event
  • Follow up regarding your booking or event planning

We will not use your contact details for unsolicited marketing without your explicit consent.

4. Google Analytics

This website uses Google Analytics to understand how visitors engage with our content. Google Analytics collects anonymised usage data including page views, session duration, and general location (city/country level). We do not collect personally identifiable information through analytics.

Google Analytics uses cookies. You may opt out of analytics tracking by installing the Google Analytics Opt-out Browser Add-on.

5. Data sharing

We do not sell, rent, or share your personal information with third parties, except:

  • Oaón Events — our sister company and décor partner, only where relevant to your event enquiry, and only with your knowledge
  • Netlify — our website host, which processes form submissions on our behalf under their own privacy policy

No data is sold to advertisers, data brokers, or any commercial third parties.

6. Data retention

Enquiry form submissions are retained for 12 months from the date of submission. After this period, your data is deleted from our records unless an active booking or ongoing correspondence requires us to retain it longer.

7. Your rights under POPIA

You have the right to:

  • Know whether we hold personal information about you
  • Request access to your personal information
  • Request correction of inaccurate information
  • Request deletion of your personal information
  • Object to the processing of your personal information

To exercise any of these rights, email us at hello@venueoaon.co.za. We will respond within 30 days.

8. Cookies

This website uses cookies only for Google Analytics (see section 4). We do not use advertising cookies, tracking pixels, or session-based login cookies. You may disable cookies in your browser settings at any time.

9. Security

We take reasonable technical and organisational measures to protect your personal information against unauthorised access, loss, or misuse. Our website is served over HTTPS. Form submissions are handled by Netlify, which encrypts data in transit.

10. Changes to this policy

We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. When we do, the effective date above will be updated. Continued use of this website after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

11. Contact us

For any privacy-related queries, requests, or complaints, please contact us at:

Venue Oaón
Montana, Pretoria, Gauteng, South Africa
hello@venueoaon.co.za

An intimate event space in Montana, Pretoria for small, considered gatherings of 20–40 people.
